records.question: What manufacturers produce products that are priced exactly at 120?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE products.price = 120
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT manufacturers.code
FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE products.price = 120

records.question: Which manufacturers named Fujitsu have products listed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.name = 'Fujitsu'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code
FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.name = 'Fujitsu'

records.question: What manufacturers headquartered in Taiwan were founded by John and have revenue of at least 130.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
WHERE manufacturers.headquarter = 'Taiwan' AND manufacturers.founder = 'John' AND manufacturers.revenue >= 130.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code
FROM manufacturers
WHERE manufacturers.headquarter = 'Taiwan'
  AND manufacturers.founder = 'John'
  AND manufacturers.revenue >= 130.0

records.question: Which manufacturers named Iomega, founded by Mary, headquartered in Beijing, have revenue of at most 200 and offer a ZIP drive priced at no more than 150?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.revenue <= 200.0 AND manufacturers.headquarter = 'Beijing' AND manufacturers.founder = 'Mary' AND products.name = 'ZIP drive' AND products.price <= 150 AND manufacturers.name = 'Iomega'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.code
FROM Manufacturers m
JOIN Products p ON m.code = p.manufacturer
WHERE m.revenue <= 200.0
  AND m.headquarter = 'Beijing'
  AND m.founder = 'Mary'
  AND m.name = 'Iomega'
  AND p.name = 'ZIP drive'
  AND p.price <= 150
GROUP BY m.code
HAVING COUNT(p.code) > 0

records.question: Which manufacturers named Creative Labs, founded by Owen and headquartered in Austin, have revenue at most 100.0 and produce a product named DVD drive?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.revenue <= 100.0 AND manufacturers.name = 'Creative Labs' AND manufacturers.founder = 'Owen' AND manufacturers.headquarter = 'Austin' AND products.name = 'DVD drive'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.code
FROM Manufacturers m
JOIN Products p ON m.code = p.manufacturer
WHERE m.revenue <= 100.0
  AND m.name = 'Creative Labs'
  AND m.founder = 'Owen'
  AND m.headquarter = 'Austin'
  AND p.name = 'DVD drive'
GROUP BY m.code
HAVING COUNT(p.code) >= 1

  AND p.name = 'Memory' AND p.price <= 120

records.question: Which manufacturers named Creative Labs, founded by Owen and headquartered in Austin, have at least 100.0 in revenue and offer CD drive products priced at most 90?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.founder = 'Owen' AND products.name = 'CD drive' AND manufacturers.headquarter = 'Austin' AND products.price <= 90 AND manufacturers.revenue >= 100.0 AND manufacturers.name = 'Creative Labs'

SELECT m.code
FROM Manufacturers m
JOIN Products p ON m.code = p.manufacturer
WHERE m.founder = 'Owen'
  AND m.headquarter = 'Austin'
  AND m.revenue >= 100.0
  AND m.name = 'Creative Labs'
  AND p.name = 'CD drive'
  AND p.price <= 90
GROUP BY m.code
HAVING COUNT(p.code) > 0
